stories.title: Lakers Eliminate Rockets 98-78 — LeBron 28, Reaves Back, LA Heads to West Semis vs. Thunder

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Lakers are MOVING ON.

LeBron: 28 PTS | 8 AST | 7 REB
Reaves BACK: 15 PTS
Ayton: 16 REB

LA built a 27-3 run and NEVER looked back. Rockets done 4-2.

#HoopHeroes #Lakers

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The rematch nobody saw coming.

LeBron James vs. OKC. Round 2 starts TUESDAY.

Thunder swept their way here. Lakers just eliminated the Rockets 4-2.

This is the series of the West Semis. #HoopHeroes #Lakers #Thunder

article.headline: Lakers Eliminate Rockets 98-78 — LeBron 28, Reaves Back, LA Heads to West Semis vs. Thunder

stories.title: Cade's 19-Point 4th Quarter Lifts Pistons From 24 Down to Force Game 7

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
CADE. CUNNINGHAM.

Down 24. The crowd silent. The series almost over.

Then Cade dropped 19 in the 4th quarter — 32 PTS / 10 REB total — and the Pistons STORMED back 93-79 to force Game 7.

#HoopHeroes #Pistons

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Cade Cunningham: first Pistons player since ISIAH THOMAS with 30+ PTS and 10+ REB in an elimination game.

Detroit was down 24. They outscored Orlando 55-19 in the 2nd half.

GAME 7. Sunday. Detroit. #HoopHeroes #Pistons

article.headline: Down 24 and Out? Not Cade Cunningham — Pistons Storm Back 93-79 to Force Game 7

stories.title: Barrett Hits 29-Foot OT Buzzer-Beater to Push Raptors-Cavaliers to Game 7

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
RJ BARRETT. ARE YOU KIDDING ME?

29-FOOT THREE. 1.2 SECONDS LEFT IN OT.

Raptors survive 112-110. First player in NBA HISTORY to hit a game-winner in the final 2 seconds of OT to stay alive.

#HoopHeroes #Raptors

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Toronto won't die.

Scottie Barnes: 25 PTS / 14 AST
RJ Barrett: 29-foot buzzer-beater in OT

Cavaliers had home court. They had Mobley's 26/14. They had it.

Then they didn't. Game 7. Sunday. Cleveland. #HoopHeroes #Raptors

article.headline: RJ Barrett's 29-Foot OT Miracle Keeps Raptors Alive — Cavaliers-Toronto Headed to Game 7

stories.title: Game 7 Tonight — Celtics vs. 76ers, 7:30 PM ET, Embiid Probable, Tatum Cleared

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
GAME 7 TONIGHT. 7:30 PM ET. TD Garden.

Embiid probable. Tatum cleared. Maxey ready.

This is the biggest game of the season for both teams. Winner faces the Knicks.

Who's winning this? #HoopHeroes #Celtics #Sixers

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
Joel Embiid is PROBABLE for Game 7.

Post-appendectomy. Still not 100%.

His words: "I tell my brain I feel amazing."

If he goes nuclear in Boston tonight, this is HISTORIC. Celtics are 8.5-pt favorites.

#HoopHeroes #Sixers

article.headline: Celtics vs. 76ers Game 7 Preview — Embiid Probable, Tatum Cleared, Everything on the Line Tonight

stories.title: Second Round Picture Taking Shape — Thunder-Lakers Tuesday, Spurs-Wolves Set

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The West is SET.

No. 1 Thunder vs. No. 4 Lakers — TUESDAY in OKC
No. 2 Spurs vs. No. 6 Wolves

SGA. Wembanyama. LeBron. Ant (if healthy).

Sunday's Game 7s determine the East bracket. #HoopHeroes
